steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with $-1$ in the function. Keep the parentheses around the negative input because powers and multiplication affect the sign differently.
$$f(-1)=(-1)^3+4(-1)^2-8(-1)-2$$

steps.title: Simplify each term
steps.content: Compute the powers and signs carefully. $$f(-1)=-1+4(1)+8-2$$ $$f(-1)=-1+4+8-2$$ $$f(-1)=9$$ The answer is C.
